login.title: Log In
login.subtitle: Sign in securely with your institutional account (SSO)

validation.email: Must be a valid email address

messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

targets.title: Page Management
targets.subtitle: Manage and view all your created pages

form.title: Site Configuration
form.subtitle: Complete the following fields to configure your website

techStack.label: Technology
techStack.placeholder: Ex: Uses Vue js, Node.js, MySQL

url.label: Site URL
url.help: Enter the complete URL including https://

instructions.label: Instructions
instructions.help: Provide special instructions or additional notes

manualHtmlContent.label: Manual HTML Content
manualHtmlContent.placeholder: Paste the complete HTML code of the page here (optional)...
manualHtmlContent.help: Optionally, you can provide the complete HTML content of the page for analysis without scraping

form.successMessage: The configuration has been saved successfully.

auditUrlValidations.title: URL Validations
auditUrlValidations.subtitle: Validate schemas from multiple URLs in batch with AI analysis

empty.title: No URL validations yet
empty.subtitle: Create your first validation to analyze schemas across multiple URLs

form.title: New URL Validation
form.subtitle: Validate structured schemas from multiple URLs in batch with AI assistance

nameValidation.label: Validation Name
nameValidation.help: Descriptive name to identify this validation

descriptionValidation.label: Description
descriptionValidation.placeholder: E.g.: Validate hotel schemas against proposal
descriptionValidation.help: Detailed description of the validation objective

sourceType.label: Source Type
sourceType.help: Select the type of entity that will be the reference source

sourceId.label: Reference Source
sourceId.help: Select the audit or comparison as reference

urls.label: URLs to Validate
urls.help: Enter one URL per line. The structured schema of each URL will be validated.

aiInstruction.label: AI Instruction (optional)
aiInstruction.placeholder: E.g.: Focus on validating if they have checkinTime and checkoutTime
aiInstruction.help: Specific instruction to guide the AI analysis

confirmModal.title: Validation Created!
confirmModal.message: Your URL validation has been submitted successfully
confirmModal.description: The analysis will be processed in the background. You can check the status in the list.
confirmModal.processingNote: AI analysis may take several minutes depending on the number of URLs.
confirmModal.name: Name

auditSchemas.title: Schema.org Proposals
auditSchemas.subtitle: Generate and manage structured schema proposals for SEO with AI analysis

empty.title: No schema proposals yet
empty.subtitle: Create your first Schema.org proposal to improve your site's SEO

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Proposal
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this schema proposal? This action cannot be undone.

form.title: New Schema.org Proposal
form.subtitle: Analyze and improve the structured schemas of your page with AI assistance

sourceType.label: Source Type
sourceType.help: Select the type of entity that will be the source of the analysis

sourceId.label: Base Audit
sourceId.help: Select the audit whose original schema will be analyzed

programmingLanguage.label: Programming Language
programmingLanguage.help: Language in which the CQRS/SOLID implementation model will be generated

modifiedSchemaJson.label: Modified / Proposed JSON-LD Schema
modifiedSchemaJson.help: Paste here the proposed or modified JSON-LD schema to compare with the original

includeAI.label: Include Artificial Intelligence Analysis
includeAI.help: Enable this option to get a detailed AI-generated report with recommendations and CQRS model

confirmModal.title: Proposal Created!
confirmModal.message: Your schema proposal has been submitted successfully
confirmModal.description: The analysis will be processed in the background. You can check the status in the list.
confirmModal.processingNote: The AI analysis may take several minutes. You can continue using the application while it processes.

audits.title: Audit Management
audits.subtitle: Manage and view all your created audits

comparisons.title: Audit Comparisons
comparisons.subtitle: View and manage all your audit comparisons

form.title: Web Audit
form.selectPage: Select a web page to audit...

lighthouse.title: Lighthouse Data
lighthouse.noData: No Lighthouse data available for this audit.

ai.title: AI Suggestions
ai.noData: No AI suggestions available for this audit.

compare.title: Compare Audits
compare.subtitle: Select and compare multiple web page audits

basePage.label: Base Web Page
basePage.help: Select the web page that will be the base for comparison

comparePages.label: Web Pages to Compare
comparePages.help: Select one or more web pages to compare with the base
comparePages.required: Please select at least one page to compare.

includeAI.label: Include AI Analysis
includeAI.help: Enable this option to get recommendations generated by artificial intelligence
